productName: 0.5g Live Resin Inf. 2 Pack Joints - Jack Herer - 1g
description: A sativa pre-roll of Jack Herer supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of pine, woody, and earthy, with an active, daytime spark. A little goes a long way.
